item.title: Scots property investments are 'subdued'
item.description: ... the total deal volume. Among the quarter's headline transactions was the sale of the DWS PBSA portfolio to La Caisse and Vita, which included two assets in Glasgow and Edinburgh. ...

item.title: 100m deal for Scots hotel drives major rise in property sales
item.author: heraldscotland.com
item.description: The two sectors accounted for 67% of deal volumes during the period, with transactions including the sale of the DWS PBSA portfolio, including two assets in Glasgow and Edinburgh, to La Caisse and Vita.
